title: Zoom - time duration of video conferences
excerpt: Can you please confirm the maximum time duration of the video conferences in the integrated zoom package on Mondays - is it unlimited time or are there additional charges for going over a certain period?  If its in the c…

posts.author: jengordon (Jennifer Gordon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can you please confirm the maximum time duration of the video conferences in the integrated zoom package on Mondays - is it unlimited time or are there additional charges for going over a certain period? If its in the company package where can I find these details?

thank you!

posts.author: adibar (adi)
posts.cookedHtml:
jengordon:

confirm the maximum time duration of the video conferences in the integrated zoom

Zoom has limited time of a call - for free packages. I’m not 100% sure, but i think its like an hour.

posts.author: ErickE-monday.com (Erick E.)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jennifer!

Erick here from the monday.com team!

Zoom and monday.com subscriptions are completely separate and the ability to use Zoom will not come as part of your monday.com subscription.

If you have a separate Zoom subscription, you can surely make use of the monday.com - zooom integration, which will allow you to log meetings in your monday.com platform once completed.

As per the information on Zoom’s website, “Zoom offers a full-featured Basic Plan for free with unlimited meetings. Your Basic plan has a 40 minutes time limit on meetings with three or more total participants”

Zoom is surely a great tool! We are making good use of it at the current time
